Name: Eco Multi BASE 14-15.6"
Short description:
Laptop Bag Eco Multi BASE 14-15.6" Red A light notebook case with protective padding.
  • Made of 9 recycled PET bottles
  • Padded notebook compartment
  • Metal frame for extra protection
  • High-quality metal features
  • Notebook security strap
  • Document compartment on the back
  • Front pocket with storage space for mobile accessories
  • Comfortable padded handle
  • Removable, adjustable shoulder strap
Description:
Overview

Today's actions shape tomorrow's world. Which is why, here at DICOTA, we are dedicated to developing environmentally friendly solutions and therefore make all the items in our ECO collections out of sustainable, recycled PET. We reuse up to 19 PET bottles, so you will receive an environmentally friendly product with a life-long guarantee. Our PET products also have the quality, look and finish that you know and love. The compact Eco Multi BASE case offers ideal protection for your laptop thanks to its padded notebook compartment. The case fully protects devices between 14 and 15.6" and the elastic strap also secures them within their compartment. The Eco Multi BASE guarantees extra stability and protection with its metal frame, as well as flexible mobility thanks to its lightweight design. Your smartphone or other smaller items like cables, pens or chargers can be stored in the convenient front pocket, so they are always to hand. The case's handles make it comfortable to carry and it can be attached to a suitcase in seconds with its built-in strap. It can also be carried using its adjustable shoulder strap. The Eco Multi BASE is therefore perfect for you if you always on the go and want to support the recycling of PET bottles with an eco-friendly case.
Specifications
  • Clamshell Design
  • protective padding
  • light case
  • Metal frame for extra protection
  • Front pocket with storage space for mobile accessories

Name: Ultra Skin PRO 13-13.3

  • Perfect fit with elastic neoprene

  • Flexible front pocket for accessories

Description:
Overview

The Ultra Skin PRO accompanies you reliably and provides custom-fitted protection for your 13-13.3" notebook or Ultrabook. The especially lightweight case combines compact design with robust materials. The material selection makes the Ultra Skin PRO built to last. The case is made of durable neoprene combined with nylon and real leather details. A soft synthetic fur lining on the inside protects your notebook from scratches. This allows you to charge your notebook or Ultrabook conveniently, without sacrificing maximum protection.

Name: Laptop Backpack MOVE 13-15.6"
Short description:
• Notebook compartment cushioned with High Density Foam (HDF) & padded slip pocket for tablets up to 10.5 inches
  • YKK Quick & Easy Lock System
  • Side pocket for power bank to charge your smartphone on the go
  • Notebook compartment cushioned with High Density Foam (HDF) & padded slip pocket for tablets up to 10.5 inches
  • YKK Quick & Easy Lock System
  • Side pocket for power bank to charge your smartphone on the go
  • Adjustable straps at the front for jackets, yoga mats, etc.
  • Ergonomic back cushioning
  • Cushioned shoulder straps including adjustable chest belt
Description:
Overview

From yoga classes to the office. MOVE is designed for daily use. Comfortable thanks to its ergonomic back cushioning and cushioned shoulder straps with an adjustable chest belt. Perfectly manoeuvre your backpack thanks to the two handles for carrying. The fabric is made of water-repellent materials but in case of thunderstorms, the backpack also includes a rain cover with a reflective DICOTA logo. The primary storage area contains a notebook compartment cushioned with High Density Foam (HDF), a padded slip pocket for tablets up to 10.5 inches, a divider for documents and an elastic mesh pocket to hold your drink bottle. The second main compartment contains dividers for headphones and folders. Enjoy the bag's functional details everywhere you go. The Backpack MOVE features two adjustable straps at the front that can hold a yoga mat or a jacket. The two front pockets can be used to store accessories such as pens, charging cables or smartphones. The right-hand side pocket (looking at the backpack from the front) is designed to charge your devices on the go. Place your power bank inside and connect to your phone. The pocket on the left-hand side can be used for quick access to water bottles, umbrellas and key cards. This backpack comes with the Quick & Easy Lock System form YKK. This system easily locks the zippers, securing your backpack in seconds. Pull the two zippers together to lock them, or unlock them by pulling the sliders down into the lower plastic part. The backpack is available in two colours.

Name: Dicota Backpack GO 13-15.6 Black
Short description:
• Notebook compartment cushioned with High Density Foam (HDF) in the back panel for anti-theft protection
  • Open, expandable compartment for your active gear including elastic mesh side pockets with a metal hook for fastening
  • Ergonomic back cushioning

Description:
Overview

Stylish and functional, this original daypack holds your gym and work essentials. The Backpack GO is comfortable to carry thanks to its ergonomic back cushioning and padded shoulder straps with an adjustable chest belt. Also includes a handle for carrying. The open front compartment expands easily to fit anything you need. Pack your sports shoes, cycling helmet or wet sports clothes and easily secure them with the metal hook and compression straps on the sides. The backpack includes a removable rain cover with a reflective DICOTA logo.   Made out of water-repellent material, the Backpack GO is perfect for carrying and protecting your tech gear. Store your computer and documents in the notebook compartment cushioned with High Density Foam (HDF). The compartment is hidden in the back panel to provide perfect anti-theft protection. The main compartment contains one divider for tablets or documents and a zipped pocket for headphones. The spacious front compartments have a workstation for a pen and small items, such as power banks or charging cables. The backpack has a large front pocket and a loop to attach a bike LED light for when you cycle. Last but not least, there are two mesh pockets on the sides for drink bottles and umbrellas. Available in two colours.

Name: Dicota Accessory Pouch Eco MOVE Small
Short description:
• For business, travel and gaming accessories
  • Functional interior helps to keep travel and business essentials organized
  • Main compartment with elastic straps to fix charging devices, power bank and cables
Description:
Lived sustainability with a clear conscience - the accessories pouches MOVE are manufactured from recycled PET and are kind to the environment. Consistent recycling helps to conserve resources. At DICOTA, it's the foundation of our innovative solutions. Within the main material of the pouch, 3 PET bottles are given a new life - without compromising on quality, functionality or design. The bag offers excellent protection for your devices and is comfortable and easy to carry. Designed for daily use. Equipped with practical functions that make your life easier.   Passport, ticket, smartphone, charger, cables, power bank, adapter, headphones, keys, gaming console, games, controller and more. With the Accessories Pouch MOVE you enjoy carefree travelling, knowing that all your belongings are perfectly organized and always within reach. The sophisticated interior with a variation of pockets, zipper compartments and flexible fixation straps provides storage space for everything you cannot miss during your journey. The RFID lined zipper compartment protects against unwanted scans, ensuring that your cards and personal information remain private and confidential. When travelling on a plane, use the key-holder as a hanger to attach the pouch to the seat in front of you and thereby safe space to comfortably rest your legs. Besides its great functionality, the pouch convinces as well in terms of design and durability thanks to an exciting combination of high-quality Polyester materials made from recycled PET.
  • Made from 3 recycled PET bottles
  • For business, travel and gaming accessories
  • Functional interior helps to keep travel and business essentials organized
  • Main compartment with elastic straps to fix charging devices, power bank and cables
  • Additional zippered compartment with RFID blocker and slip-in pocket for passport, smartphone and other mobile accessories
  • Further zipper compartment on the front
  • Webbing loop with key chain ring can be used as hanger
  • Also perfect for gaming device & related accessories

Name: Dicota USB-C 12-in-1 Docking Station 5K HDMI/DP PD 100W UK
Short description:
USB-C 12-in-1 Docking Station 5K HDMI/DP PD 100W (UK) Designed for home office or portable use - with power plug for UK
  • Maximum-performance docking station for up to three monitors simultaneously
  • Dock is compatible with almost any current laptop (connects via USB 3.0, USB-C or Thunderbolt™ 3/4 ports)
  • 2 DisplayPort and 3 HDMI ports available*
  • Supports high 4K resolution with refresh rates up to 60 Hz
  • 3x USB 3.1 and 2x USB-C allow you to easily connect your USB devices and peripherals (two ports support 10 Gbps speeds)
  • GLAN Ethernet supports network speeds of 10/100/1000 Mbps, providing a robust and high-speed internet connection
  • Combo 3.5 mm audio input/output jack for easy connection to headset or speakers
  • The docking station supports up to 100W of power to a connected laptop or tablet
Description:
Overview

A powerful professional docking station that supports output to up to three external monitors in up to 4K high resolution. The dock can be used with practically any laptop as it supports connection to all common ports: USB 3.0, USB-C and Thunderbolt™ 3/4, while supporting all common current operating systems. Plenty of USB ports (including those that support speeds of up to 10 Gbps), reliable and fast connection to the corporate network thanks to the integrated LAN port and support for installation behind the monitor all make this docking station the ideal companion for true professionals. It also supports charging of your laptop or tablet up to 100 W. This product contains a power plug for UK.
  • VESA bracket compatible to help keep your desk tidy and free from cables, plus K-lock slot for added security
  • Power-saving On/Off switch to reduce energy consumption when the docking station is not in use
  • Supports Windows 10, macOS, Android and Linux
  • Package contents: Docking Station, Power adapter 130W, USB-C to USB-C/USB-A cable (100cm), Manual
  • Note: Connection to three monitors will only be possible if the laptop has a Thunderbolt™ 3/4 port or a USB-C port that supports video transfer (USB-C DP Alt mode)
  • *HDMI 3 port will only work when connected to a laptop with Thunderbolt™ 3/4 port or USB-C port supporting video transfer (called USB-C DP Alt mode)

Name: Dicota USB-C 11-in-1 Docking Station 5K HDMI/DP PD 100W UK

  • Compatible with USB-C and Thunderbolt™ laptops & tablets. (The host device must support DisplayPort Alt mode)
  • 1x DisplayPort and 1x HDMI supporting up to dual 4K/60Hz or a single 5K/60Hz display
  • 6x USB-ports (5x USB-A, 1x USB-C) make it easy to connect multiple USB devices and peripherals
  • Note: macOS does not support Multi Stream Transport (MST) technology. Connecting two monitors to the station on macOS will result in both monitors showing the same image
Description:
Overview

USB-C office docking station with support for up to 2 external monitors with 4K resolution. The station is compatible with any laptop equipped with a USB-C or Thunderbolt™ 3 port. 6x USB ports, reliable and quick connection to your business network thanks to an integrated LAN port and support for installation behind a monitor make the docking station an ideal partner for professionals. The station is capable of charging your laptop or tablet with up to 100 W. Integrated latest DP 1.4 protocol supports 5K/60 Hz resolution, making the device suitable for even professional graphics designers, data analysts, film editors and fans of HD video. The docking station also comes with a USB-C power adapter with a total power of 112 W (USB-C port: 100 W and 1x USB-A port with a power of 12 W). This product contains a power plug for UK
  • Provides up to 100W Power Delivery for compatible USB-C and Thunderbolt™ laptops & tablets (cable included). The host device must support USB-C Power Delivery

Description:

Overview

Notebook design has evolved over the years. Lighter, thinner and in a reduced design. Comfortable to wear, comfortable to work with. However, the trendsetters usually no longer offer enough USB ports to connect all peripheral devices. The new, convenient USB-C 4-in-1 portable hub is the solution. Enjoy maximum productivity anywhere. Expand your computer's USB connection with the integrated USB-C port. The DICOTA-HUB is compatible with Mac, Windows and other USB-C supported devices. Thanks to the plug-and-play specification, you do not need any additional device configuration. The first USB-A link to the right supports both battery charging (BC1.2) with an output of up to 7.5 W and data transfer. The second USB-A supports data transfer at up to 5 Gbit/s and charges connected USB devices. The first USB-C supports data transfer and charging at up to 5 Gbps for the connected USB device, while the (right) USB-C PD3.0 supports up to 5 Gbps as a downstream data port or up to 100 W Power Delivery charging supported as an upstream charging port.

The Secret 2-Way privacy filters prevent your display from being viewed from two sides (left/right).

  • Limits side-to-side vision to ±30°
  • 48% blue light cutting
  • Touch capable
  • A clear view at all times
  • Accurate colour reproduction

  • High scratch resistance
  • Reversible between glossy or matte side
  • Immediate adhesion and detachment

Description:
Overview

Remote working has made tablets increasingly popular. In public places, it is difficult to protect the data on the display from being seen by third parties. DICOTA has the perfect solution for you! The Secret 2-Way is a highly effective protective film for your display that protects personal and confidential data from prying eyes. The film adheres directly to the full surface of your display within a question of seconds thanks to the magnetic strips. The Secret 2-Way protective film not only prevents unwanted viewing of your display, but also protects against scratches. Additional product features include high mechanical resilience and ease of removal. The 2-way technology protects the display from being viewed by prying eyes from two sides: left/right. A handy and effective way to ensure that no one but you can see your data. Ideal for use in a hotel or on the bus, train or plane.
